name: dataObjectLocation
description: URL(s) pointing to the location(s) where the actual digital object bitstream or data file can be accessed or downloaded.
ExpectedUse: Direct access to digital object content, enabling retrieval, download, and programmatic access to research data, software, documents, and other digital assets.
